You asked if I was over it.
I am not.
I have simply built a life
large enough to hold it quietly.

Marcus Wise

Some love does not leave.
It just stops
knocking.

MWMarcus Wise

Marcus Wise

I grew where I was planted.
Then I learned
the soil was never mine.

MWMarcus Wise

Marcus Wise
@marcus.wisee

The storm did not break me.
It taught my roots
where the water was.

MWMarcus Wise

IMP-TWEET-50

Marcus Wise
@marcus.wisee

I forgave you
not because you asked,
but because I was tired
of carrying the key
to a cage you never sat in.

MWMarcus Wise

Marcus Wise
@marcus.wisee

You were the lesson.
I mistook you
for the destination.

MWMarcus Wise

Tweet Light
Marcus Wise
@marcus.wisee

with nowhere
left to go.

Marcus Wise

the home
I kept looking for
in other people.

@marcus.wisee

The quiet after you left
was not empty.
It was mine.

So do the flowers
that survive the frost.

and still be grateful
they are gone.

    Export

    Import Cards

    Paste markdown with one card per block. Separate cards with a line containing only ---. Required keys at top: category, title (optional for question / quotes / maxims). Blank line, then body content parsed by category.

    Manage Imports

    You have 100 imported cards. Merge writes a new HTML file with library + imports baked in. Clear removes all imports from this file's storage.
